# Project general coding guidelines

## Code Style
- Use semantic HTML5 elements such as `<main>`, `<header>`, `<section>`, `<form>`, and `<button>`.
- Prefer modern JavaScript (ES6+) features like `const`, `let`, arrow functions, `template literals`, and `spread`.
- Keep markup, styles, and scripts separated into their own files.
- Avoid inline styles and inline JavaScript.

## Accessibility
- Use descriptive labels, ARIA attributes, and accessible button text.
- Ensure the UI works with keyboard navigation and screen readers.
- Use high contrast text and clear focus indicators.

## Project Behavior
- Keep the task list responsive and mobile-friendly.
- Validate input before creating a task and trim whitespace.
- Persist task state using local storage when possible.
- Keep the user interface simple, clear, and easy to use.
